channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree looks to be dying, 22nd March
item.description:
Looking at the base the tree appears to have decay

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crown Woods Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegally parked caravan, 22nd March
item.description:
This caravan has been parked here for two weeks with no reg displayed. There is also no activity noticed from the caravan

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Newnton Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Office chair fly tipped, 22nd March
item.description:
On pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen's Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 22nd March
item.description:
Loads of rubbish
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ampleforth Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge dumped on the pavement, 22nd March
item.description:
See image

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marmadon Road, Plumstead

item.title: Exploded rubbish bag on pavement, 22nd March
item.description:
Might be a fox- but needs to be removed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Camberwell Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on the pavement- heath and safety, 22nd March
item.description:
Rubbish bags spread across the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bannockburn Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped on street, 22nd March
item.description:
Residents dumping rubbish without even bothering to tie the bins

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress and assorted building materials, also paint pots a little further along., 22nd March
item.description:
Flytipped rubbish. 3 lots.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Park Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on Timberpond Road, 22nd March
item.description:
I reported this over 2 weeks ago and it still hasn’t been collected. Can this please be collected as a matter of urgency. It’s not on private land it’s on a Southwark Council owned highway.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Timber Pond Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 22nd March
item.description:
Sign in window states car broken 10th MAY at 9.42pm mechanic will be out to fix tomorrow- it’s now March 2026! Car vrm plate removed & Vin covered - car been here 10 months

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bromholm Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle left for 14 days, 22nd March
item.description:
This has been on our road for a few weeks with no sign of the owners. We think it has been stolen and dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carlton Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light day burning, 22nd March
item.description:
Loampit Bale outside Asda. Street light is day burning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Loampit Vale, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
